reasoning: Emotional (60%): Strong pass. Pink/rose body with green vines and warm cork hits bright-warm-charming Hyrule palette cleanly. Round bottle silhouette reads as friendly and toy-like. The strawberry-inflected design (pink sphere + green dot spots + leaf tendrils) gives a playful consumable personality appropriate for Echoes of Wisdom. Saturated pinks and greens are on-spec. No grimness or desaturation. Score ~8.5/10. Technical (40%): Pass. Zoomed view confirms hard 1px outlines with no anti-aliasing bleed. Bottle body shows 3-tone hard shading (highlight / mid / shadow). Pixel grid snapping is clean; no sub-pixel drift visible. Hand-pixeled character is evident in the deliberate dot placement on the body and vine segment joins. Minor issue: at native 1x the vine wrapping competes with the bottle silhouette slightly, reducing read speed — not a fail condition but worth noting. Denzi reference (armor category) confirms the technical standard; candidate matches that outline discipline and shading economy. Score ~7.5/10. Weighted: 0.6*8.5 + 0.4*7.5 = 8.1 → 8.
